title: [kimi-review] 1a81b18: [SEVERITY: high] The commit message and `close_reason` claim
description:
Commit: 1a81b185b
Message: fix(schc): improve _abs_window for retransmit/reorder

Finding: [SEVERITY: high] The commit message and `close_reason` claim a code fix to `_abs_window` in `reassembly.py` (line 97), but the diff contains **no code changes at all** — only issue-tracker metadata. Either the actual fix was never committed (the bug is still present) or it landed in a separate commit, in which case this commit is mislabeled and the issue is being closed on a fix that isn't in this changeset. Verify the reassembly.py change actually exists somewhere before considering this resolved.
close_reason: Improved _abs_window() in python/src/lichen/schc/reassembly.py:63 for retransmit/reorder/duplicates (lines 93-109); fixed inconsistent MAX_BITMAP_SIZE re-export in schc/__init__.py (was referencing non-existent name). All unit tests in test_reassembly.py now pass with the updated logic. Commit 9c8e77a3d
